mapper.sql: CASE A.ATHR_ID WHEN 'ECSGN01' THEN '901' WHEN 'ECSSU01' THEN '902' ELSE SUBSTR(A.ATHR_ID, 6, 3) END
mapper.select:
/* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_retrieveAthr */ SELECT A.ATHR_ID, A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD, A.ATHR_NM, A.ATHR_DC, A.IDVINFO_DEAL_YN, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:DD') AS FRST_REGIST_DT, A.FRST_RGSTR_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT KORNAME FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE EMPNO = A.FRST_RGSTR_ID ) AS FRST_RGSTR_NM, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:DD') AS LAST_UPDT_DT, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT KORNAME FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE EMPNO = A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) AS LAST_UPDUSR_NM FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr A
, tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr B WHERE A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = SUBSTR(B.ATHR_ID, 0, 3) AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId}
WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATHR_NM LIKE '%' || #{athrNm} || '%'
AND (A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = #{intnSysDivCd} OR A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = 'ECS')
AND A.ATHR_ID NOT IN('ECSGN01', 'ECSSU01') ORDER BY
, A.ATHR_ID

/* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_retrieveAthrEcs */ SELECT A.ATHR_ID, A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD, A.ATHR_NM, A.ATHR_DC, A.IDVINFO_DEAL_YN, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:DD') AS FRST_REGIST_DT, A.FRST_RGSTR_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT KORNAME FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE EMPNO = A.FRST_RGSTR_ID ) AS FRST_RGSTR_NM, TO_CHAR(A.LAST_UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:DD') AS LAST_UPDT_DT, A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID, (SELECT DISTINCT KORNAME FROM HRM.vm_hr01601 WHERE EMPNO = A.LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) AS LAST_UPDUSR_NM FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr A
, tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr B WHERE A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = SUBSTR(B.ATHR_ID, 0, 3) AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId}
WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.ATHR_NM LIKE '%' || #{athrNm} || '%'
AND (A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = #{intnSysDivCd} OR A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = 'ECS')
ORDER BY
, A.ATHR_ID
mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_insertAthrMng */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_athr ( ATHR_ID, INTN_SYS_DIV_CD, ATHR_NM, ATHR_DC, USE_YN, IDVINFO_DEAL_YN, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{athrId}, #{intnSysDivCd}, #{athrNm}, #{athrDc}, 'Y', DECODE( #{idvinfoDealYn}, '', 'N', 'Y'), SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: /* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_updateAthrMng */ UPDATE tm_ecs_intn_athr SET INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = #{intnSysDivCd}, ATHR_NM = #{athrNm}, ATHR_DC = #{athrDc}, IDVINFO_DEAL_YN = #{idvinfoDealYn}, LAST_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE ATHR_ID = #{athrId}
mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_selectAthr */ SELECT A.ATHR_ID, A.ATHR_NM, A.ATHR_DC, A.IDVINFO_DEAL_YN FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr A WHERE A.ATHR_ID = #{value}

/* TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_Dao_selectAthrUse */ SELECT A.ATHR_ID, A.ATHR_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu WHERE ATHR_ID = A.ATHR_ID ) AS MENU_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr WHERE ATHR_ID = A.ATHR_ID ) AS USR_CNT FROM TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR A WHERE A.ATHR_ID = #{athrId}
